history.content:
<thought>
I am at the upper-left interior area facing right, but the cell directly ahead is lava. The safe path starts by going downward along the left side, so I should turn to face down first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing down, and the cell directly below me is an empty floor tile. Moving forward will safely begin the path downward along the left side.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly below me is empty, and continuing downward stays on the safe left-side corridor toward the lower open area.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am still facing down, but the path below leads toward a blocked section on the next row. I should turn right to face the open corridor along row 4.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
Facing right, the cell ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. I should turn to face the open cell below instead.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly below me is open floor, and moving down progresses toward the lower open area where I can route around the lava toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down, but the cell ahead is lava. The open path lies to my left, so I should rotate to face it.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing the open cell to the left, which is safe floor and part of the route around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing left, but the cell directly ahead is a wall, so moving forward is blocked. The safe route is below me through the open corridor, so I should turn to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing down, and the cell below is open floor. Moving forward will enter the safe corridor that leads toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down, but the cell directly below is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The open path continues to the right along this corridor, so I should turn left to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right, and the cell ahead is open floor. The safe route continues along this row toward the right, so I should advance.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is still open floor, and continuing right keeps me on the safe corridor toward the goal area.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am still facing right with empty floor directly ahead, so I should keep moving along the safe path.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The space ahead remains clear, and moving right continues me toward the open area near the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I can keep advancing right on this safe row, getting closer to a column where I can head down toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am near the right side now. The next cell to the right is still safe, and reaching the far-right corridor will let me turn down toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at the right edge facing right, so I cannot move forward. The goal is below me, so I should turn to face downward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing downward in the rightmost corridor, and the cell below is safe floor. Moving down brings me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
